title: SUPER KITCHEN Large Silicone Dish Drying Mats Thickness with a Multifunctional Silicone Scrubber for Countertop,Heat Resistant Trivet,Draining Board Mat, 17.7 x 15.7inch, Grey
features: [ FASTER DRYING and EASY TO CLEAN ] - Our silicone dish drying mat is made of premium food grade silicone. It is safe to dry your dishes. The unique wide grooves design not only increases airflow for faster drying but also inhibits the growth of mold and mildew and make it easy to wipe. Dishwasher safe. The matched multifunctional and upgraded silicone scrubber with a handle helps you to hold it easily and clean the mat simply.

[ HIGH QUALITY DESIGN ] - The outer height is 6mm. It is higher and thicker than most drying mats on the market which is only 4mm. Our draining mat is stronger than the 4MM mat which is too thin and soft. Super Kitchen high-quality mat is much thicker and durable.

[ SAVE SPACE and EASY TO STORE ] - Loads of area to place crockery, pans, glasses and cutlery and leave until they dry. The flexible mat is an excellent alternative if you want to eliminate the normal type of dish drainer which takes up a lot of space. It also can be easily rolled away into the cupboard or hung for storage if you need more worktop space.

[ VERSATILITY ] - Heat-resistant up to 220 °C/425 °F. Place the air fryer, hot pan, kettle etc on it as heat-proof mat. Perfect for surface protector, mess collector, such as worktop mat, table mat, placement mat, drawer mat, counter mat and so on.

[ HOW IT WORKS ] - Place this dish drying mat next to the sink so that the washed dishes and cutlery can be set on it straight from the sink. After the dishes and cutlery are dry, put them back to the cupboard and pour the remaining water from the mat into the sink.
